content.rendered:
Breakfast – aamiainen – is the most important meal of the day, they say. Here are some great foods to start your day with!

Finnish English
Juotavaa Drinks
kahvi coffee
kahvi maidolla coffee with milk
kahvi kerman kera coffee with cream
musta kahvi coffee without milk
kahvi maitovaralla a coffee with space for milk
kofeiiniton kahvi decaffeinated coffee
latte latte
tee tea
tee sitruunan kera tea with lemon
maito milk
kaakao hot cocoa
tomaattimehu tomato juice
tuoremehu fruit juice
appelsiinimehu orange juice
Munat Eggs
kananmuna egg
kovaksi keitetty muna hard-boiled egg
pehmeäksi keitetty muna soft-boiled egg
kinkkua ja munia ham and eggs
pekonia ja munia bacon and eggs
munakokkeli scrambled eggs
paistettu muna fried egg
uppomuna poached egg
munavoi egg butter
Finnish English
Leivonnaiset Baked goods
leipä bread
leipäviipale a slice of bread
paahdettu leipä toast
tumma leipä brown bread
vaalea leipä white bread
ruisleipä rye bread
kauraleipä oat bread
karjalanpiirakka Karelian pasty
pulla bun (pic)
voileipä sandwich
sämpylä roll
voisarvi croissant
gluteeniton leipä gluten-free bread
Muuta Other
murot cereal
puuro porridge
mysli muesli
hunaja honey
sokeri sugar
hillo jam
marmeladi marmelade
maapähkinävoi peanut butter
suklaalevite chocolate spread
leivänpäälliset cold cuts
meetvursti salami

Did you find your own breakfast’s foods in these lists?
